positive: Minimalist, highly contrasting graphic art of a stylized celestial map, featuring geometric constellations and swirling nebulae. The main subject is a large, elegant crescent moon overlapping intricate line-art constellations in deep indigo and matte gold leaf tones. Use clean silhouettes and a flat, illustrative style with subtle gradients and pointillism for depth. Composition must be centered, suitable for repeating apparel prints. Dramatic overhead studio lighting, ultra-sharp focus, high contrast, vector illustration quality, clean lines, print-ready.
negative: low quality, blurry, watermark, text, logo, artifact, noise, signature, cropped, messy, cartoonish, photorealistic, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs
